name: Machine learning on the Fashion MNIST dataset
description: I built a convolutional neural network and an autoencoder in Julia to predict classes in the Fashion MNIST dataset, getting a 0.895 accuracy on the CNN and a 0.838 on the autoencoder.

name: Virtual MIPS
description: Virtual MIPS processor emulator. A python program turns source files into binaries than the virtual CPU written in rust then executes.

name: ROTehc
description: Took part on an IOT hackaton where I developed a real time data visualization web app with VueJS and a device management backend written in TypeScript.

name: Advent of code
description: I enjoy solving as much AOC challenges as I can every year during December before my exams start. I usually solve every challenge using a couple languages so I don't get too rusty.

name: CUDA ASCII Mandelbrot fractal
description: Toy project to experiment with CUDA. The code renders an ASCII fractal on the terminal, but the code could be adapted to render an image.

name: Hackers Week website
description: Made the website for the Hackers Week organized by the students council at ETSII UMA.

name: Brainf*ck suite
description: Suite for the brainf*ck language. A collection of python scripts to generate bf source code that produces the output specified in a file, compress, decompress and run that bf code through an interpreter.
